description: Implement ADR-2603301200. Generate a token-efficient architecture fingerprint from project sources (go.mod/package.json/Cargo.toml, workplan, ADRs), persist in SpacetimeDB, and inject into every LLM inference system prompt. Prevents models from generating architecturally wrong code by ensuring every call has project-level context.

tasks.name: Add architecture_fingerprint table to hexflo-coordination WASM module
tasks.description: In spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/lib.rs, add a new SpacetimeDB table `architecture_fingerprint` with fields: project_id (String, primary key), language (String), framework (String), output_type (String — 'cli', 'web-api', 'library', 'standalone'), architecture_style (String — 'hexagonal', 'standalone', 'layered'), constraints (String — JSON array, max 5 items), active_adrs (String — JSON array of {id, summary} pairs), workplan_objective (String), fingerprint_tokens (u32), generated_at (Timestamp). Add reducers: upsert_fingerprint(project_id, ...fields) and delete_fingerprint(project_id). Done when: WASM module compiles.

phases.name: FingerprintExtractor — extract architecture context from project sources

tasks.name: FingerprintExtractor struct in hex-nexus
tasks.description: Create hex-nexus/src/analysis/fingerprint_extractor.rs. Implement FingerprintExtractor with async fn extract(project_root: &Path, workplan_path: Option<&Path>) -> ArchitectureFingerprint. Extraction logic: (1) Language/framework: check for go.mod (language=go, framework=stdlib unless go.mod imports gin/echo/fiber), package.json (language=typescript, framework from dependencies: express/fastify/hono/nextjs), Cargo.toml (language=rust, framework from [dependencies]: axum/actix-web/warp/tonic or 'standalone' if none). (2) Output type: infer from workplan objective string — contains 'CLI'/'command'/'tool' → 'cli'; contains 'API'/'server'/'REST' → 'web-api'; contains 'library'/'crate'/'package' → 'library'; else 'standalone'. (3) Architecture style: has src/core/domain/ → 'hexagonal'; has internal/ or cmd/ (Go) → 'layered'; else 'standalone'. (4) Workplan objective: read workplan JSON, extract steps[0].description or top-level description field, truncate to 100 chars. (5) Constraints: extract from workplan steps[0].constraints[] array if present; else derive up to 3 from output_type + language. (6) Active ADRs: read docs/adrs/*.md in project_root, sort by filename descending, take first 3, extract first sentence after '## Decision' section, prefix with ADR id. (7) Token budget: join all fields, estimate tokens as len()/4, if over 512 drop active_adrs first then constraints. Return ArchitectureFingerprint struct. Unit tests: Go flat project (go.mod with no imports) → language=go, output_type inferred from workplan; TypeScript with express → framework=express, output_type=web-api; Rust with axum → framework=axum; missing workplan → graceful fallback with empty constraints. Done when: cargo test -p hex-nexus -- fingerprint passes.

phases.name: REST API — fingerprint generate + retrieve endpoints

tasks.name: POST /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint — generate and store
tasks.description: In hex-nexus/src/routes/ (likely projects.rs or a new fingerprint.rs), add POST /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint handler. Request body: { project_root: String, workplan_path: Option<String> }. Handler: (1) call FingerprintExtractor::extract(project_root, workplan_path). (2) Store in SpacetimeDB via upsert_fingerprint reducer (or SQLite fallback table arch_fingerprints). (3) Return the fingerprint as JSON. Register route in hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs. Done when: cargo build -p hex-nexus passes and endpoint is registered.

tasks.name: GET /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint — retrieve for injection

phases.name: Injection — prepend fingerprint to every inference system prompt

tasks.name: NexusClient::fetch_fingerprint_text — retrieve formatted injection block
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/nexus_client.rs, add method: pub async fn fetch_fingerprint_text(&self, project_id: &str) -> Option<String>. Makes GET /api/projects/{project_id}/fingerprint/text, returns the plain text block on 200, None on any error or 404. Cache the result in a tokio::sync::OnceCell<String> keyed by project_id so it is fetched once per process lifetime. Done when: method compiles and returns None gracefully when nexus is unavailable.

tasks.name: Inject fingerprint into all agent inference calls
tasks.description: In each agent that calls /api/inference/complete (reviewer.rs, tester.rs, fix_agent.rs, code_phase.rs), prepend the fingerprint text to the system_prompt string before building the request body. Pattern: let arch_ctx = client.fetch_fingerprint_text(&project_id).await.unwrap_or_default(); let system = if arch_ctx.is_empty() { system_prompt } else { format!("{arch_ctx}\n\n{system_prompt}") }. The project_id must be threaded through AgentContext (add project_id: Option<String> field to AgentContext in supervisor.rs). If project_id is None or fingerprint fetch fails, proceed without injection — never block inference. Files to update: agents/reviewer.rs, agents/tester.rs, pipeline/fix_agent.rs, pipeline/code_phase.rs. Done when: cargo build -p hex-cli passes and agents include fingerprint prefix in system prompt when project_id is set.

phases.name: hex dev integration — generate fingerprint after workplan phase

tasks.name: Call fingerprint generation after workplan phase in hex dev
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/pipeline/workplan_phase.rs (or wherever workplan phase completes), after writing the workplan JSON file, call POST /api/projects/{project_id}/fingerprint with project_root and workplan_path. Store the returned project_id in the session context so it propagates to AgentContext.project_id. Log: 'generated architecture fingerprint ({N} tokens)' on success; warn but continue on failure. Done when: running hex dev start 'build a fizzbuzz CLI in Go' --auto prints the fingerprint generation log line and the fingerprint is visible via GET /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint.

phases.name: MCP tool — hex_fingerprint_get for agent inspection

tasks.name: hex_fingerprint_get MCP tool + hex fingerprint show CLI command
tasks.description: Add MCP tool mcp__hex__hex_fingerprint_get that calls GET /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint and returns the structured JSON. Also add CLI command hex fingerprint show [path] that prints the formatted injection block for the project at path (defaults to cwd). Register both in the appropriate command dispatch and MCP server tool list. Done when: hex fingerprint show prints the architecture context block for a project that has been through hex dev.

tasks.name: Architecture fingerprint panel in project detail view
tasks.description: In hex-nexus/assets/src/ (Solid.js dashboard), add a collapsible 'Architecture Context' panel to the project detail view. Display: language badge, framework badge, output_type badge, workplan objective text, constraints list, active ADRs list, token count chip (green if ≤512, yellow if 400-512, red if over). Subscribe to architecture_fingerprint SpacetimeDB table for live updates. Show 'Not generated — run hex dev to generate' when no fingerprint exists for the project. Done when: the panel renders correctly in the dashboard for a project that has completed hex dev.
